Metadata.Changelog:
* Updated for version-4b6315bf1f0a4dbb
Awesome updates are coming soon

- Replaced manually Login with Browser login
- Added VS Code style diagnostics display, severity colors, counts, and clickable Luau error codes
- Added Problems tree/table view toggle
- Improved Problems tab performance to prevent freezes on scripts with diagnostics
- Reduced unnecessary LSP syncs when switching between script tabs
- Optimized Monaco/LSP startup so the app no longer preloads editor systems on launch
- Added lazy mounting for Editor, Script Hub, and Settings to improve startup smoothness
- Improved Monaco editor startup reliability with loader retry and cache recovery
- Added smart scroll behavior for Terminal and Roblox Output
- Added inline search bars for Problems, Roblox Output, and Terminal
- Fixed Always on top behavior when saving Problems output
- Fixed F11 fullscreen 
- Fixed maximized window behavior so rounded corners are removed
- Improved LSP diagnostic stability and race handling

- Fixed login
- Fixed installer
- Fixed auto Update
- Patched sharing Installation file

- Luau 0.721 -> 0.722
- Removed roblox's require warning
- Fixed ALL reflection functions (gethiddenproperty, sethiddenproperty, setscriptable, isscriptable)
- Added getfflag, setfflag, getfflagtype
- Added multi instance support
- Added sethiddenstack/setstackhidden
- Fixed a debug.getupvalue/debug.getupvalues crash issue
- Hopefully fixed injection crashes

Scripts that have been fixed with this update:
- VexHub, Unnamed Enhancements, BK Hub, Atlas BSS and more
- A LOT of SAB/Bloxstrike scripts
- We're waiting for Banana Cat Hub to whitelist us. This is not an issue on our side.
- Added downgrade detection (STOP BLAMING BANS ON REAL, IT'S BECAUSE YOU'RE DOWNGRADING)

- Fixed execute not working in Script Hub
- Made Script Hub search more reliable
- fixed kiciahook v3
